'''Eirrauus''' was a [[Desert/Legends|desert]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] populated by the [[Eirrauc]]s.<ref name="Wanderer" /> It was located in the [[Quence sector/Legends|Quence sector]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].
